prompt: Here's a photo of the display at my gas station. I have $50 to burn. What should I grab?
assertions: Lists the games detected from the photo, or explicitly says it could not confidently identify any and falls back to all active games.
If games are detected, limits the analysis to the matched games instead of all active games.
Provides a concrete buy list within the $50 budget plus summary stats.
Does not fabricate results if live data cannot be fetched or parsed.
